payload.summary: The paid DeepSeek V4 Pro path passes a live child-agent smoke test, but FishToucher cannot yet validate a durable receipt that binds a packet to the actual provider request and response.
claims: The current message envelope records a declared provider and model only.
The verified runtime chain is GPT parent to Codex coordinator to the Keychain-backed DeepSeek V4 Pro adapter.
A self-declared provider label is not sufficient invocation provenance.
requests: Add a dependency-free invocation receipt validator.
Expose receipt validation through the FishToucher CLI.
Cover malformed hashes, timestamps, and exit-status contradictions with regression tests.
